description: Generated M004/S01 live acquisition manifest. Targets are captured public artifacts and are safe to ingest without network access.

targets.title: California Secretary of State certified candidate list press release for June 2, 2026 primary
targets.notes: DuckDuckGo query: California Secretary of State 2026 primary certified list candidates. HTML acquisition captures the source-owned public page because the linked certified-list PDF is outside the current HTML/text acquisition allowlist.

targets.title: Candidates - June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election
targets.notes: DuckDuckGo query: San Francisco Department of Elections June 2 2026 election candidates measures. Source-owned SF.gov candidate report selected over the calendar page.

targets.title: S.F. Chronicle endorsements for the 2026 California Primary Election
targets.notes: DuckDuckGo query: San Francisco Chronicle 2026 primary endorsements San Francisco. The endorsement page was preferred over the broader voter-guide page to stay under the capture byte limit and match the source's endorsement role.

targets.title: June 2026 Voter Guide | SPUR
targets.notes: DuckDuckGo query: SPUR voter guide June 2026 San Francisco. Source-owned June 2026 guide selected over the announcement page.

targets.title: GrowSF Voter Guide
targets.notes: Candidate found in public search results and probed directly; page advertises the June 2, 2026 Primary Election and GrowSF endorsements.

targets.title: June 2, 2026 Primary Election Voter Guide — San Francisco Democratic Party
targets.notes: Candidate appeared in San Francisco Department of Elections adjacent search results and probed as a source-owned 2026 voter-guide artifact.

targets.title: 2026 Endorsements — Alice B. Toklas LGBTQ Democratic Club
targets.notes: The public endorsements page linked a source-owned 2026 Endorsements page, which probed successfully and includes June 2, 2026 signals.

targets.title: Endorsements | United Democratic Club
targets.notes: Direct probe found source-owned endorsements page with June 2026 Primary Election signals.

targets.title: Endorsements - SEIU 1021
targets.notes: Direct probe found source-owned endorsements page with an Election Endorsements: June 2, 2026 section.

targets.title: 2026 Endorsements — San Francisco Tenants Union
targets.notes: Direct probe found source-owned 2026 Endorsements page.

targets.title: 2026 Endorsements | Sierra Club San Francisco Bay Chapter
targets.notes: The Bay Chapter endorsements page linked a source-owned 2026 endorsements page, which probed successfully.
